clarity.notes: UI-REDESIGN-PLAYBOOK.md phases A–H, file checklist, AI agent prompt, and do/don't rules are explicit for a complete RN app.

hierarchy.notes: Foundation → nav → screens order prevents big-bang rewrites; high-impact tab CTA early.

typography.notes: Type scale and anti-patterns called out; execution deferred to AppText primitive.

motion.notes: Smoothness recipe + motion.ts + reduced-motion gate included.

brand.notes: Aligned to DESIGN.md / theme tokens; medical screens protected from gamification chrome.
